title: CLI Authority Audit Closeout
summary: #357 is a bounded audit prerequisite under #356. The audit artifact classifies root, planning, and memory CLI authority and identifies root `defaults` as the first low-risk generated adapter candidate. #358 should define the generation contract before #359 implements that adapter. #356 and #230 remain open for the broader lane.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Audit remaining hand-authored CLI authority before generated adapter work
[Workspace]: Generate shipped CLI adapters from authoritative package definitions
issue_classifications.evidence: docs/reviews/cli-authority-audit-2026-04-26.md identifies root `defaults` as the first generated-adapter candidate after #358 defines the contract.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Define the canonical command adapter generation contract
issue_classifications.evidence: The audit identifies which fields and boundaries the generation contract must preserve.
